title: Learn React in 60 Minutes — Complete Beginner's Guide 2024
description: This comprehensive guide takes you from absolute zero to building your first React app. We cover components, props, state, hooks, and much more. Perfect for complete beginners who already know basic JavaScript.

title: JavaScript Promises & Async/Await — The Full Picture
description: Demystifying asynchronous JavaScript from callbacks to Promises to async/await. With real-world examples of fetch API usage and error handling best practices. This is the guide you wished existed when you started.

title: CSS Grid & Flexbox Crash Course — Build Real Layouts Fast
description: Master modern CSS layouts in one sitting. We build 5 real-world layouts using both CSS Grid and Flexbox, explaining when to use which one and why. All code available on GitHub.

title: Git & GitHub for Beginners — Everything You Need to Know
description: A fully beginner-friendly walkthrough of Git version control and GitHub collaboration. Covers init, commit, push, pull, branches, merging, and resolving conflicts. Essential knowledge for every developer.

title: Build a REST API with Node.js & Express — Step by Step
description: Create a fully functional REST API from scratch using Node.js and Express. We connect to a MongoDB database, implement CRUD operations, add authentication with JWT, and deploy to Render. Full source code provided.

title: Python for Data Science — Pandas, NumPy & Matplotlib
description: A hands-on introduction to the Python data science stack. We analyze a real dataset end-to-end — cleaning, exploring, visualizing, and drawing insights. No prior data science experience needed.

title: TypeScript in 45 Minutes — Types, Interfaces & Generics
description: Get up to speed with TypeScript quickly. This video covers everything from basic type annotations to advanced generics and utility types. By the end you'll confidently add TypeScript to any existing project.

title: Docker & Containers Explained — Deploy Any App Anywhere
description: Docker from zero to production. Learn what containers are, why they matter, and how to Dockerize a full-stack application. We also cover Docker Compose for multi-service apps and push images to Docker Hub.
